scripts.sync-widget: cp aftercare-text-widget.js public/aftercare-text-widget.js && cp aftercare-badge-poll.js public/aftercare-badge-poll.js && npx terser aftercare-text-widget.js -o aftercare-text-widget.min.js --compress --mangle --comments "/Aftercare Text Widget/" && npx terser aftercare-badge-poll.js -o aftercare-badge-poll.min.js --compress --mangle --comments "/Aftercare Badge Poll/" && cp aftercare-text-widget.min.js public/aftercare-text-widget.min.js && cp aftercare-badge-poll.min.js public/aftercare-badge-poll.min.js
